Classes/Close-combat-specialist.title: Close combat specialist
Classes/Close-combat-specialist.content:
A Delta green specialist focusing mostly on melee abilities.
1  Mean right hook
Unarmed combat rolls and melee weapons can be replaced by strength rolls.
2. Base Level up
+10% (2 pts) to any base stat. Example STR, CON, DEXâ€¦
3. Killer Instincts

Killing monsters results in a 1d6 sanity gain
Monsters surviving a fight with your charicter results in a 1d6 sanity loss.

4. Tough it out
Once per session, when taking damage greater than a d4, reduce that damage to a d4
5. Lethal blow
On a successful critical strike, roll again.
6. Razors Edge
Creation of a custom melee weapon

30% more accurate
or
1d6 more damaging

Classes/Gunslinger.title: Gunslinger
Classes/Gunslinger.content:
1. Quick draw
Add half your firearms stat to your dex when rolling quickdraw.
Example:
80% Firearms
50% Dextarity
~(90%) Quick Draw
2. Base Level up
+10% (2 pts) to any base stat. Example STR, CON, DEXâ€¦
3. Lethal Burst
Add +10% lethality to all firearms rolls.
4. Killer Instincts

Killing monsters results in a 1d6 sanity gain
Monsters surviving a fight with your charicter results in a 1d6 sanity loss.

5. Trained Shooter
Aiming bonus is now +40% (was 20% previously)
6. Burst fire
Once per session, shoot twice on a single turn.

Classes/Prepper.title: Prepper
Classes/Prepper.content:
1. Tinker
Artillery, Demolitions, and Heavy Weapons rolls can be replaced with INT rolls
2. Stat Buff
+10% (2 pts) to any base stat. Example STR, CON, DEXâ€¦
3. Inside buyers
Weapons purchases are processed at one level cheaper.
Ex: Unusual â†’ Standard
4. Ghost Guns
Military Restricted weapons are no longer restricted and can be manufactured at home.
5. My baby
Creation of a custom weapon, Major Expense or below. This has the following buffs.

30% more accurate
or
1d6 more damaging

6. Improvements
Upgrade your custom weapon once again.

Add 10% lethality to the weapon.
or
Add a 1d6 per turn (poison, fire, or radiation) effect.
or
A once per session detonator which destroys your weapon (You can spend a home scene to make a new one). Dealing 2d20 to anyone in a 30m radius.

Gain a new action: Concentration on Spell.
1d2 willpower , takes 2 turns.

Note: If you already have unnatural this does not go above 65%

Classes/Scholar-of-mushroom.title: Scholar of mushroom
Classes/Scholar-of-mushroom.content:
1. Dive into the madness
+50% to unnatural. Your willpower can be reduced to 1 before you feel any effects.

Note: If you already have unnatural this does not go above 65%
Note: this will reduce your sanity capacity to your unnatural.

2. Arcane Spells I
Choose

1 level 1 spell






























Spell NameDescriptionWillpower costDifficultyCharm PersonCharm a person or thing, this can be used to convince someone of something minor, or trick them. This cannot be used to change peoples core beliefs.- Possible: Convince a security guard his shift actually ended 3 minutes ago.- Not possible: Tell someone to run forever.1d2 willpower+10% offsetRandom TeleportTeleport to a random location within 30ft of you. Teleport target must roll luck.1d4 willpower0% offset.Inflict NauseaTarget creature gets -30% penalty to all actions it tries to take on the next turn1d2 willpower0% offset
3. Feel Good Fuzziness

Saving an innocent person restores 1d10+2 of sanity
Accidentally killing an innocent person is an extra 1d6 of sanity loss.

4. Arcane Spells II
Choose

2 level 1 spells
1 level 2 spells

The creature must roll POW minus your unnatural each turn to break free.1d2 Willpower per turn+10%StunTarget creature gets -55% penalty to all actions it tries to take on the next turn Critical success deals 1d12 of damage in addition.1d4 willpower-5% offsetSpecified TeleportTeleport to a location of your choice within 30ft of you.1d6 willpower+10% difficulty

The creature must roll POW minus your unnatural each turn to break free.1d2 Willpower per turn * num of creatures+5% per creature controlled.Mind StopTarget creature gets -75% penalty to all actions it tries to take on the next turn and takes 1d6 damage. Critical success deals 1d20 of damage in addition.1d6 willpower+30% offsetTeleport OtherTeleport to another creature location of your choice within 45ft of you.Into a wall: 2d6 damage per turn, and STR -40% to break free(this depends on wall type also)Dropped thru air: 4d6 damage.3d4 willpower+10% difficulty

index.title: Code Red
index.content:
Delta Green is a covert group inside the United States federal government. Its mission is to investigate, contain, and conceal unnatural events, because the unnatural is real and it kills. The world of Delta Green is like our own, but beyond the edges of reality are powers that outstrip the human mindâ€™s capacity for understanding. Sometimes those powers bleed through into our world and destroy every- thing they touch.
This is a long running dnd(dungeons and dragons ) campaign that has been going for several years, each session gets a â€śmission reportâ€ť, I encourage you read them!
Note: This is a work of fiction


                  
                    Rules and Character Sheets
                  
                


Rule Book
Pre-gen character sheets





                  
                    Classes
                  
                


Gunslinger
Prepper
Close combat specialist
Scholar of Sand
Scholar of mushroom
Scholar of The Great Machineâ„˘





                  
                    Home life options
                  
                

Throughout the day, the normal adult tends to have this thing called â€śfree timeâ€ť. Typically they spend this time doing fun or relaxing things. Not you. As a secret agent you spend this time preparing for the next mission.

Stay on the case: Your agent remains on the case, researching unknown objects they have collected at the expense of their own sanity.
Learn a new Skill: Increase your skill in an area, roll INT, on a success Add 1d10 on a failure add 1d6.
Restore Sanity: Conduct some sort of sanity regaining activity. Roll Sanity, on success gain 1d10, on failure gain 1d4 sanity.
Purchase Items: Your Character purchases things, and items. (Look at rulebook page 88)



Mission Reports :: The Monster Drinkers







































































































Mission NameDescriptionSummaryCasualtiesResultFirst things LastDelta green friendly died several days ago of a heart attack. Sweep his apartment and remove any evidence of the the unnatural and delta green.Mission success, items contained, threats eliminated1  SuccessLost in the â€śwoodsâ€ťA young child is found wandering through the woods. Face idâ€™s match them to a missing child caseâ€¦ from 45 years agoBrandon Recovered. Beer consumed. Medium conspiracy required. Park Rangers eviscerated.3  ResolvedCottonâ€™s catastropheLate night call, 1am. Another group of agents is in trouble. Get there as fast as possible. Recover the briefcase, eliminate all unnatural.Briefcase in agent hands. Building rigged to blow. Epstein giant killed. Agent GPS tracker signal lost.1  ResolvedRed NestAgents investigate the underground structure they found previously. Recover the briefcase and agent cotton.Agent Cotton survived (somehow). Children rescued from â€śthe diddy caveâ€ť. Gooners slain. Building destroyed. Briefcase recovered.5  SuccessRed AlertA boring simple mission, to rest and relax after the hectic last missions. Retrieve a box from storage, and then transport it to the location.Players prevented assassination attempt on the handlers life. Improvised brain surgery performed. Bears intimidated.1  ResolvedDoomscrollingA suspected Wizard was flagged to have boarded a Metro Bus (east bound Division 25 stop 3 @ 1:23 am). Bring him in alive.Wizard recovered alive. Bus destroyed. Adâ€™s endured.1  SuccessThe bird missionA delta green friendly, Professor Parsons was killed yesterday at his workplace (Oregon state university). His research was primarily into birds. Contain the unnatural.Aviary destroyed. Birds charred. Civilians killed. Agent John accidentally hotboxed himself.1  ResolvedGoing shoppingAgents are tasked with getting agent cotton a haircut at the barbershop and converting a metal box into MP4 format.North Korean APC acquired. Haircut successful. Agent Schnitzel was chewed on4  SuccessRed RatThe Handler has located the traitor that exposed his location in a previous mission (Red Alert). Considered armed an extremely dangerous. Hunt the traitor down and eliminate him.Traitor killed. Passenger ferry transported to unknown dimension. Over 85 innocent civilians killed or maimed. Unknown number of civilians trapped in unknown dimension. Train destroyed.85  Critical FailureThe good stuffA bizarre mass murder involving fire occurred in Forks Washington. Investigate. Prevent this from happening again.Several drug addicts killed. One taken hostage. Bartender rizzed.2  SuccessThe good stuff IIAgents pursue the cause of â€śthe stuffâ€ťAgents saved by wizard. Threats neutralized. Agent John gained a pen pal.0  SuccessWait, you look like me.An independent lab was broken into last night. The main suspects are â€¦ team monster drinkers?Doppelgangers were either killed by the team or died via their own hands. Local police officer discovered his new sexuality.4  SuccessWait, you look like me II

Anomaly unconfined. Agent W killed.150  Critical FailureA typical day in New YorkAgents investigate swarms of rats ripping new yorkers to shreds.Photograph cursed agent, requiring high-level intervention. No public knowledge. Containment successful through internal ops.2  UnresolvedPawn E4Bizarre murders, with a jade statue being left as a calling card.Artifact was anomalous and deadly. Contained with minimal exposure. Statue mistaken for jesus.2  ResolvedVapour TrailsSmall town USA, multiple townspeople killed via a large animal. Officials ruled it a suicide.Investigation into terrorist apartment revealed giant ants. Situation handled without wider exposure.
